name: firebase_init
description: Use this to initialize selected Firebase services in the workspace (Cloud Firestore database, Firebase Data Connect, Firebase Realtime Database, Firebase AI Logic). All services are optional; specify only the products you want to set up. You can initialize new features into an existing project directory, but re-initializing an existing feature may overwrite configuration. To deploy the initialized features, run the `firebase deploy` command after `firebase_init` tool.

rules_filename.description: The file to use for Realtime Database Security Rules.

rules.description: The security rules to use for Realtime Database Security Rules.

database.description: Provide this object to initialize Firebase Realtime Database in this project directory.

database_id.description: The database ID to use for Firestore.

location_id.description: The GCP region ID to set up the Firestore database.

rules_filename.description: The file to use for Firestore Security Rules.

rules.description: The security rules to use for Firestore Security Rules. Default to open rules that expire in 30 days.

firestore.description: Provide this object to initialize Cloud Firestore in this project directory.

service_id.description: The Firebase Data Connect service ID to initialize. Default to match the current folder name.

location_id.description: The GCP region ID to set up the Firebase Data Connect service.

cloudsql_instance_id.description:
The GCP Cloud SQL instance ID to use in the Firebase Data Connect service. By default, use <serviceId>-fdc. 
Set `provision_cloudsql` to true to start Cloud SQL provisioning.

cloudsql_database.description: The Postgres database ID to use in the Firebase Data Connect service.

provision_cloudsql.description:
If true, provision the Cloud SQL instance if `cloudsql_instance_id` does not exist already. 
The first Cloud SQL instance in the project will use the Data Connect no-cost trial. See its terms of service: https://firebase.google.com/pricing.

dataconnect.description:
Provide this object to initialize Firebase Data Connect with Cloud SQL Postgres in this project directory.
It installs Data Connect Generated SDKs in all detected apps in the folder.

rules_filename.description: The file to use for Firebase Storage Security Rules.

rules.description: The security rules to use for Firebase Storage Security Rules. Default to closed rules that deny all access.

storage.description: Provide this object to initialize Firebase Storage in this project directory.

app_id.description: Firebase app ID (format: 1:PROJECT_NUMBER:PLATFORM:APP_ID). Must be an existing app in your Firebase project.

ailogic.description: Enable Firebase AI Logic feature for existing app

site_id.description: The ID of the hosting site to configure. If omitted and there is a default hosting site, that will be used.

public_directory.description: The directory containing public files that will be served. If using a build tool, this likely should be the output directory of that tool.

hosting.description: Provide this object to initialize Firebase Hosting in this project directory.

oAuthBrandDisplayName.description: The display name for the OAuth brand.

supportEmail.description: The support email for the OAuth brand.

auth.description: Provide this object to initialize Firebase Authentication.
